Project Description:
- Non-open 2-stage procedure (23-07032) for a multi-supplier framework agreement on IT services across 8 lots
- Call-offs as work packages via: direct call-offs (≤ lot thresholds) or mini-competitions (> thresholds or quality-critical)
- Service delivery on-site (TK HQ Hamburg) and/or remote; standard service times: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00
- Semi-annual price mini-competitions set ranklists per lot for direct call-offs; invoicing via XRechnung (Leitweg-ID 992-80116-93)
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 21.02.2024; last answers: 23.02.2024
- Invitation to submit offers (Phase 2): ~KW 16/2024; info §134 GWB: ~KW 19/2024; award: ~KW 20/2024
- Binding period ends: 15.07.2024
- Service start: mini-competitions may start immediately after award

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Lot 1 — Java development:
  - Deliverables: design, new/continuous development of enterprise Java systems; test development/automation; test management
  - Key requirements: Fullstack Java/JEE, Spring; BPMN; DB/SQL; Docker/Kubernetes/OpenShift; CoreMedia optional; agile (Scrum/Kanban)
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct call-offs ≤30 PT; mini-competition >30 PT or quality-critical; respond to direct call-offs within 3 working days; service times Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00
- Lot 2 — Agile consulting:
  - Deliverables: agile coaching, Scrum Mastering, facilitation/training, team enablement
  - Key requirements: proven coaching of software teams; Scrum/Kanban/scaled frameworks
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days accept/decline; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 3 — IT project management:
  - Deliverables: lead IT projects (focus software dev), goal tracking, risk/issue mgmt., stakeholder comms
  - Key requirements: multi-year IT PM; agile (Scrum/Kanban)
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤20 PT; mini >20 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 4 — Process management:
  - Deliverables: E2E process design, BPMN 2.0 modelling, optimization/standardization, workshops
  - Key requirements: ≥3y consulting; BPMN 2.0; governance/KPIs; change methods; large orgs (>1,000 staff) preferred
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 5 — Native app dev iOS/Android:
  - Deliverables: native feature development, refactoring, UI/unit tests, code reviews, integration, bugfixing
  - Key requirements: Android: Kotlin, Android Studio/Gradle, Git; iOS: Swift, Xcode, UIKit/SwiftUI; testing: Espresso/JUnit/Mockito or XCTest; numeric: ≥600 days programming (each platform) within last 5 years
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 6 — Functional consulting:
  - Deliverables: IT architecture (enterprise/software/solution), DBaaS (Postgres/MongoDB), Vinna/.NET, Python, KI/ML, Cloud Landing Zone
  - Key requirements: senior expertise; PoCs/pilots; reviews/tech debt; DB specialists; Engineer Cloud (Decision Layer/Landing Zone)
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 7 — IT infrastructure & platform services:
  - Deliverables: DevOps, containerization, CI/CD infra, monitoring/logging, infra ops (AD, firewall, storage, backup), solution architecture
  - Key requirements: Linux admin; Docker; Kubernetes/OpenShift; scripting (Groovy/Python/PowerShell); GitHub/Jenkins/Nexus/Maven; architecture (SaaS/IaaS/PaaS, hybrid/multi-cloud)
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- Lot 8 — IT security:
  - Deliverables: cyber security consulting, SOC/SIEM, vulnerability scanning services/processes, audits, KRITIS/ISO 27001, security architecture/network segmentation, ITIL support
  - Key requirements: ISO 27001 (audit/implementation), BSI-Grundschutz/C5, LAN/WAN/DC/Enterprise network security, firewall/VPN/IDS/IPS/DDOS
  - Thresholds/SLAs/tools: direct ≤10 PT; mini >10 PT or quality-critical; 3 working days; 09:00–18:00
- General delivery:
  - On-site TK HQ Hamburg or remote; TK provides VPN-enabled device if needed; TK-specified remote tools; German C1 (exceptions per call-off possible)
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Estimated PT per lot (framework term): L1 8,778; L2 720; L3 720; L4 240; L5 264; L6 2,382; L7 2,096; L8 966; total 16,166 PT
- Per call-off: reimbursement capped at ≤+20% vs. TK-estimated PT in the call-off
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- TK HQ: Bramfelder Straße 140, 22305 Hamburg (default for on-site)
- Remote delivery allowed; phone availability during 09:00–18:00 (Mon–Fri, excl. federal holidays)
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- EVB-IT Dienstleistungs-AGB v2.1; VOL/B
- Security lots may require: ISO 27001, BSI-Grundschutz, C5; ITIL V3/4 expertise
- Working language: German C1 (exceptions may be set per call-off)
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia allowed; joint and several liability in contract; BG declaration (E2) per lot
- Subcontracting/Eignungsleihe: identify capacities and firms; E3 per firm; professional capacity reliance only if that firm performs that part; freelancers are exempt from E3
- EU sanctions Art. 5k VO (EU) 833/2014: no participation of listed entities; >10% subcontract share ban
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic only via DTVP (Bietertool; .docx templates; max 500 MB); Textform (§126b BGB)
- Submit per lot: Application (Anlage T), E1, E2 (if consortium), E3 (if third-party)
- Questions via portal “Kommunikation”; use latest document package

Offer Submission Documents: Eigenerklärung zur Eignung je Los inkl. Auswahlkriterien (Anlage E1)
Bietergemeinschaftserklärung je Los (Anlage E2, falls BG)
Verpflichtungserklärung Drittunternehmen je Los (Anlage E3; nicht für Einzelunternehmer/Freelancer)
List of Documents: Register-/Geschäftsnummer bzw. Registergericht (falls juristische Person) angeben

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: - Los 6: ≥ 1,000,000 EUR (net, incl. third-party costs) in one of the last 3 FY (in one topic under E1 §3a)
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: - For last 3 FY: declare total turnover and turnover in comparable services per lot (e.g., Anwendungsentwicklung, Agile Beratung, IT‑Projektmanagement, Prozessmanagement, App‑Entwicklung, IT‑Infrastruktur, IT‑Sicherheit)

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: - Provide company register details where applicable (register court/number for juristic persons)
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: - Mandatory self-declarations on exclusion grounds; TK will also query Wettbewerbsregister
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: - Name intended subcontractors; E3 commitments; professional capacity reliance only if that firm also performs the relevant services

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- General for all lots: German C1; high responsiveness; knowledge transfer; expert training; multi-year experience
- Lot 1 roles: Fullstack Java/JEE dev; Test developer (≥3y test automation); Test manager; skills: Java, Spring, BPMN, SQL, Docker/Kubernetes/OpenShift; CoreMedia optional
- Lot 2 roles: Agile Coach; Scrum Master; skills: Scrum/Kanban; scaled frameworks; coaching/training/mentoring
- Lot 3 roles: IT Project Lead (software focus); skills: agile PM (Scrum/Kanban); certifications Prince2/PMI/IPMA valued
- Lot 4 roles: Process management consultant; skills: BPMN 2.0, governance/KPIs, workshop moderation; ≥3y consulting; large-enterprise experience
- Lot 5 roles: Android dev (Kotlin, Android Studio/Gradle, Git; UI/unit tests via Espresso/JUnit/Mockito; numeric: ≥600 days programming); iOS dev (Swift, Xcode, UIKit/SwiftUI; XCTest; numeric: ≥600 days in last 5 years); plus CI/Jenkins; Jetpack Compose/Combine optional
- Lot 6 roles: IT Architect (enterprise/software/solution), DB specialists (Postgres/MongoDB), Vinna/.NET (HTML, C#, Java; .NET API/REST), Python (clean code), KI/ML consultant, Engineer Cloud (Landing Zone/Decision Layer)
- Lot 7 roles: DevOps Engineer; IT‑Infrastructure Engineers; IT‑Architect Solution; skills: Linux admin, Docker, Kubernetes/OpenShift, scripting (Groovy/Python/PowerShell), CI/CD tooling (GitHub/Jenkins/Nexus/Maven), cloud (SaaS/IaaS/PaaS), AD/firewall/storage/backup
- Lot 8 roles: IT‑Security Consultant (SOC/SIEM, audits, processes), IT‑Architect Security (LAN/WAN/DC/Enterprise), ITIL consultant, IT audit; standards: ISO 27001, BSI‑Grundschutz; vendor/security certs (e.g., AWS/Microsoft/GIAC/CompTIA) valued
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Lot 1 (minimums): ≥250 Java developers (each ≥5y exp in last 5y); ≥50 Test developers/Test managers (each ≥5y/5y); ≥50 React developers (each ≥5y/5y)
- Lot 3: ≥20 IT project leaders for software projects (each ≥5y/5y)
- Lot 4: ≥10 process managers (each ≥5y/5y)
- Lot 7: ≥50 IT‑infrastructure experts (each ≥5y/5y)

Company Referrals:
- Timeframe: last 3 years before deadline; max 6 refs evaluated; use E1 tables; provide client name and period; contacts on request
- Lot 1: ≥3 (≤6) refs; Java development; each ≥100 consultant days; describe scope; evaluation includes GKV/PKV/IT‑DL clients, size bands, specializations (React/CoreMedia/Testautomation), tasks (fullstack Java, jUnit5, process engine, agile)
- Lot 2: ≥3 (≤6) refs; Agile methods (Scrum/Kanban) or agile team org in software dev; each ≥100 consultant days; tasks (moderation, agile methods, coaching, Scrum Master)
- Lot 3: ≥3 (≤6) refs; IT PM (software); project size ≥500 PT; ≥100 consultant days as project lead; tasks (Java project leadership; agile env.)
- Lot 4: ≥3 (≤6) refs; process mgmt with IT focus; each ≥50 consultant days; tasks (BPMN 2.0 modelling/automation; E2E transformation; agile env.)
Award Criteria:
- Phase 1 (selection to Phase 2): scoring per E1 matrices (per lot); max 6 refs scored; additional company metrics per lot
- Tie-breakers (per lot):
  - Lot 1: 1) % revenue from Java projects (highest); 2) # Java projects (last 5y) ≥30 BT at GKV/PKV/IT‑DL (highest); 3) draw
  - Lot 2: 1) # Scrum Masters/Agile Coaches (last 5y) with ≥5y exp placed in software projects (highest); 2) % revenue from agile consulting (highest); 3) draw
  - Lot 3: 1) # IT project leaders (software) with ≥5y exp placed to GKV/PKV/IT‑DL (last 5y) (highest); 2) # Prince2/PMI/IPMA certs (highest); 3) # IT project leaders ≥5y exp (highest); 4) draw
  - Lot 4: 1) # process managers placed to GKV/PKV/IT‑DL (last 5y) (highest); 2) # process managers with ≥5y exp (highest); 3) # process managers with ≥5y exp available (highest); 4) draw
  - Lot 5: 1) # app projects placed in last 5y (highest); 2) draw
  - Lot 6: draw
  - Lot 7: 1) % revenue in IT‑infrastructure projects per fields (highest); 2) draw
  - Lot 8: 1) % revenue in IT‑security per fields (highest); 2) draw
- Phase 2 (offer stage): no additional award criteria; eligible offers receive framework award; planned offer period 5 days (by agreement §16(6) VgV)
- Call-offs:
  - Direct call-offs: use semi-annual price ranking per lot profiles; 3 working days to accept; next ranked supplier if declined
  - Mini-competitions: offer time 3–7 days (longer if complex); criteria announced per call-off: either 100% price or Price + Expert qualification/experience
